content.text:
## Task: Set up npm/tsc/vitest/happy-dom toolchain and CSS copy script
## Step: execute

Create four files at the repo root (NOT under artifacts). (1) package.json: `{ "name": "filebrowser-ui", "private": true, "version": "1.0.0", "type": "module", "scripts": { "build": "tsc && node scripts/copy-assets.mjs", "test": "vitest run", "watch": "tsc --watch" }, "devDependencies": { "typescript": "^5.6.3", "vitest": "^2.1.4", "happy-dom": "^15.7.4" } }`. (2) tsconfig.json with compilerOptions: target "ES2022", module "ESNext", moduleResolution "Bundler", strict true, outDir "wwwroot/dist", rootDir "src", sourceMap true, lib ["ES2022","DOM","DOM.Iterable"], esModuleInterop true, forceConsistentCasingInFileNames true, skipLibCheck true, noEmitOnError true; include ["src/**/*.ts"]; exclude ["src/**/*.test.ts", "node_modules", "wwwroot"]. (3) vitest.config.ts: `import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'; export default defineConfig({ test: { environment: 'happy-dom', include: ['src/**/*.test.ts'] } });`. (4) scripts/copy-assets.mjs: an ESM script using node:fs/promises and node:path that ensures wwwroot/dist exists (mkdir recursive) and copies src/app.css to wwwroot/dist/app.css IF src/app.css exists, otherwise exits 0 silently (so builds before the CSS task don't fail). After creating the files run `npm install` to install devDependencies. NOTE for downstream tasks: because the build emits native browser ESM with no bundler, all relative TypeScript imports MUST use a `.js` extension (e.g. `import { ApiClient } from './api.js'`). Verify: `npm install` exits 0 and `node scripts/copy-assets.mjs` exits 0 (no-op since no css yet).

5. Run `npm install` to install devDependencies

content.text:
All four files have been created and verified:

| File | Status |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Created with the specified content, scripts, and devDependencies |
| `tsconfig.json` | Created with the specified compilerOptions, include/exclude |
| `vitest.config.ts` | Created with happy-dom environment and test include pattern |
| `scripts/copy-assets.mjs` | Created — creates `wwwroot/dist` dir, copies `src/app.css` if it exists, exits 0 silently otherwise |

- `npm install` completed successfully (48 packages added)
- `node scripts/copy-assets.mjs` exits 0 (no-op since `src/app.css` doesn't exist yet)
- TypeScript 5.9.3 installed and available

**Important note for downstream tasks:** Since the build emits native browser ESM with no bundler (`moduleResolution: "Bundler"` + `module: "ESNext"`), all relative TypeScript imports **must** use a `.js` extension (e.g., `import { ApiClient } from './api.js'`).
